scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only (projects, people, companies, tasks); the full Productive JSON:API surface (deals, budgets, time entries, invoices, boards, comments, custom fields, webhooks, etc.) is out of scope until Pass B. Productive is read-only in legacy (Capabilities.Write is false) so no writes.json is shipped.

excluded.reason: /api/v2/deals is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures

no allow-listed reverse-ETL writes; Productive connector is read-only
